title: ModelWinCenterX Property
description: Sets and returns the X coordinate value on the center of the model window.
notes:
Sets and returns the X coordinate value on the center of the model window. Setting values are automatically updated when the model window is removed or resized.

See Also: ModelWinCenterX Property

ModelWinCenterY Property

Vision Objects: ModelWinCenterX Property

Correlation

Geometric
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Correlation, Geometric, OCR
